failure_modes.cause: BPR set to 5.0 bar, but required is 5943.0 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle required pressure

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C may degrade PFA over time
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly inspect and replace PFA tubing

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at full pressure with upgraded BPR for 60 min; monitor for leaks or pressure drops
Run blank solvent at Q=7.46128 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct thermal cycling test on PFA tubing at 120°C for 100 hours; inspect for degradation
